display_text: Ogre Magi Aghanim's Scepter: Adds Unrefined Fireblast, a high-damage single-target stun scaling with Ogre's Strength. This upgrade counters durable heroes by ensuring a reliable and mana-efficient disable, transforming Ogre into a potent initiation and pickoff threat.
search_text: Ogre Magi Aghanim Scepter anti-durable single-target disable str scaling mana-efficient initiation

display_text: Ogre Magi Aghanim's Shard: Adds Fire Shield, a damage-absorption shield for allies that retaliates with fireballs. This counters physical burst damage, enabling Ogre to protect key allies or towers during sieges, shifting his role towards a supportive guardian.
search_text: Ogre Magi Aghanim Shard anti-physical damage absorption shield retaliate fireballs tower protection support guardian
